pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 17 or lower), resulting in bytecode incompatible with Java 21 runtime features or failing to utilize Java 21 language features if the source level is also raised.

quarkus-services/cxf-service/.mvn/wrappe.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
